items.title: Deployment threshold reporting
items.description: Publish TP, FP, TN, FN on validation at the production cutoff so stakeholders see false alarms vs misses before launch — not only accuracy or AUC.

items.title: Imbalanced classification monitoring
items.description: Track confusion-matrix cells over time on live labels (when available) — a rising FN on rare fraud or disease positives triggers alerts even if accuracy stays flat.

items.title: Error analysis sprints
items.description: Sample FP and FN examples from the matrix to label noise, feature gaps, or segment-specific failure — standard ML debugging after baseline training.

items.title: Multi-class product metrics
items.description: Use a K×K matrix for intent classifiers, support routing, or digit recognition — prioritize fixing high off-diagonal pairs that hurt UX.

items.title: Threshold tuning after model selection
items.description: Once ROC-AUC or PR-AUC picks the best scorer, sweep thresholds and compare confusion matrices to meet business constraints (max FPR, min TPR).
